description: Read the last 10 messages in the current Discord channel with Alt+1 (newest) through Alt+0 (10th newest). Alt+D moves focus to the first unread message (the 'New messages' marker). Alt+Shift+N cycles auto-reading of incoming messages in the open channel (off, polite, interrupt); the default is also set in NVDA Settings. NVDA+Ctrl+Shift+F10 saves a structure dump to the Downloads folder for debugging. Outside a channel the hotkeys warn quickly instead of hanging. The message-list search is bounded, time-limited, and cached so it cannot freeze NVDA.
